pkgmetadata.longdescription: This package defines instances of the 'Control.Monad.IO.Class.MonadIO' class (see "Control.Monad.IO.Class") for all the monad transformers in "Control.Monatron.Transformer" (except 'Control.Monadtron.Transformer.StepT') and for the zipper type (':>') in "Control.Monad.Zipper".
